title: Default End Poem
description: Sets the Minecraft End Poem back to normal.
body:
If you're anything like me, you love the Minecraft End Poem an awful lot. Unfortunately, some mods (i.e. Alex's Caves) change the End Poem to something else!

So, this pack does one thing: resets the Minecraft End Poem back to its default. That is literally it.

This pack says its for 1.20.1 (that's the only version I've gone around and tested), but honestly, this pack will probably work on every version. It will say "outdated version", but it should work.

Happy poem reading!
